project: sprocket
purpose: rust binary for agentic repo bootstrap and self-healing maintenance
status: early scaffold

read_first:
- README.md -> product overview and intent
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md -> runtime shape and extension model
- docs/BRAND.md -> name, mascot, and tone

planned_runtime_axes:
- backends -> Codex first, Claude Code next
- profiles -> Python first, then TypeScript/React and Rust
- managed_surfaces -> docs, control-plane files, validation config

early_focus:
- local CLI binary
- install/init/migrate/repair flows
- opinionated Python repo support
- milestone-driven docs maintenance
